findings.title: Potential Resource Leak in Database Connection
findings.description: The database connection 'conn' is opened using 'shared.get_conn()' but there is no explicit closing of this connection. This could lead to resource leaks if the connection is not properly closed.
findings.suggestion: Ensure that the database connection is closed after its use. Consider using a context manager or explicitly calling a close method.
